creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
I don't plan to add --disable-nodejs just for Firefox 63 as 64 or 65 won't support it.

(In reply to Martin Birgmeier from comment #0)
> Expected result:
> - Building firefox should not depend on node.js at all

Good luck convincing upstream.
https://www.mail-archive.com/dev-platform@lists.mozilla.org/msg26458.html
